notes: von Rueden & Jaeggi 2016 PNAS; phylo multilevel MA, 46 studies/33 nonindustrial societies; authors restricted to nonindustrial to limit contraception; already Fisher-z (Zr).

Zhang & Santtila 2022 (Front Psychol; China CGSS 2010-2017). Table 2 (pdf p13), Poisson w/ age offset, standardized predictors: Income(std) Men B=0.03*** SE=0.01; Education(std) Men B=0.03** SE=0.01; Sex*Income interaction B=-0.06*** SE=0.01. Poisson logIRR on a std predictor is NOT a correlation metric -> needs PI conversion decision before it can enter the r/zr pool.

Zhang & Santtila 2022 Table 2 (pdf p13): Income(std) Women B=-0.04*** SE=0.01; Education(std) Women B=-0.05*** SE=0.01. Female arm of the predicted sex reversal (tested via Sex*Income interaction B=-0.06***). Same beta->correlation conversion caveat as b1e002; needs PI.

Hopcroft 2018 (Front Sociol; US SIPP). Table 2 (pdf p5) Pearson r, children-ever-born x personal income, MEN r=+0.070*** (N~313,405). Poolable as r. CAVEAT for PI: admin-scale N -> near-zero variance will dominate any pool that also holds small evolutionary-anthro samples; PI to decide weighting/inclusion. Table 4/5 show the u-shaped income effect (unstd regressions).

Hopcroft 2018 Table 2 (pdf p5) Pearson r, children-ever-born x personal income, WOMEN r=-0.057*** (N~348,572). The female arm of the Hopcroft sex reversal. Poolable as r; same admin-scale-N caveat as b1e004.
Skirbekk 2008 Demographic Research; narrative review of fertility-by-status trends, no single poolable effect -> narrative/context, not pooled.
Bolund & Lummaa 2016 (Finland); genetic-correlation/heritability estimand, NOT status->RS -> routes to the heritability signature, not this pool.

Lidborg et al. 2020/2022 meta-analysis; predictor is dimorphism not status -> external benchmark cited in chapter Sec 6, NOT pooled with status->RS. Pooled r in forest plots -> RA extract if a dimorphism sub-pool is wanted.

Gutierrez et al. 2022 (Front Psychol); double-track fast-strategy ESEM over life-history traits (K-factor). RESOLVED 2026-07-24: no clean status->reproductive-success association is extractable; the paper models latent LH structure, not a status-fertility effect. Route to life-history context, NOT the status->RS pool (cf. b1e006 Bolund heritability, b1e007 Lidborg dimorphism).
